index.title: Mai fassarar albarkatu
index.description: Buɗe buƙatun jawo na'ura don fayilolin albarkatu a kowane repo, a kowane tsari.
index.badge: v3.0 — Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Mai fassarar albarkatu yana buɗe buƙatun jawo na'ura don fayilolin albarkatun ku ta amfani da Azure AI Translator ta hanyar SDK na hukuma - babu ƙarin ayyuka, kawai aikin aiki.
index.builtForShipping: An gina shi don jigilar kaya
index.workflowTitle: Fassarar a matsayin aikin aiki, ba aikin aiki ba.
index.workflowBody: Sauke aikin a cikin CI ɗinku na yanzu, nuna shi a Azure AI Translator, kuma bari repo ɗinku yayi magana da kowane yare da kuka yi niyya.

formats.title: Tsarin fayil shida
formats.body: Zagaye-tafiye-tafiye .resx, .xliff, .po, .json, .ini, da .restext tare da tsarin byte-stable.

config.title: Repo-level config
config.body: Sauke .github/resource-translator.yml don haɗawa da globs, glossaries, da kuma Custom Translator Categories.

glossary.title: Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Kulle sunayen alama da sharuɗɗan samfura tare da regex mai kaifin baki wanda ke kula da C ++, .NET, da abokai.

dryRun.title: Dry Run + Soft-Fail
dryRun.body: Preview fassarar ba tare da rubuta fayiloli ba, ko nuna kowane kuskure a matsayin gargadi yayin da kake maimaitawa.

outputs.title: PR-friendly outputs
outputs.body: summary-title, summary-details, da kuma has-sababbin fassarori kai tsaye a cikin create-pull-request.

sdk.title: Official Azure SDK
sdk.body: An gina shi a kan @azure-rest / ai-translation-text + @azure / core-rest-pipeline - sake gwadawa ta atomatik akan 408/429/5xx, babu HTTP da aka birgima da hannu. esbuild-bundled, audit-clean.

getting-started.title: Farawa
getting-started.lede: Ƙara fayil ɗin aiki, nuna shi zuwa takaddun shaidar mai fassarar Azure AI, kuma aikin - wanda aka gina akan SDK na Microsoft na @azure-rest / ai-translation-text - zai bincika repo don fayilolin albarkatun harshe kuma ya fitar da 'yan uwan da aka fassara.

provision.title: Samar da kayan aikin Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Ƙirƙirar albarkatun mai fassara na Azure AI a cikin tashar Azure, sannan adana waɗannan azaman asirin ajiyar GitHub don aikin zai iya karanta su:
provision.key: Maɓallin Biyan kuɗi don Kayan T

resource.title: Shigar da fayil ɗin tushen tushen
resource.body: Fayilolin albarkatu suna amfani da suna. <sourceLocale>. <ext> taro. Alal misali Gaisuwa.en.resx ya zama gaisuwa.fr.resx, gaisuwa.de.resx, da sauransu bayan gudu.

output.title: Duba fitarwa
output.body: Da zarar aikin ya gama, aikin ya fallasa fitarwa guda uku da zaku iya waya a cikin bayanin PR: taƙaitawa-take, taƙaitaccen bayani, da kuma sabbin fassarar. Har ila yau, yana rubuta taƙaitaccen bayani a cikin shafin aiki ta hanyar core.summary.

nextSteps.title: Matakai na gaba
nextSteps.configuration: Yi amfani da maɓallin keɓaɓɓu tare da .github/resource-translator.yml.
nextSteps.recipes: Duba girke-girke don monorepos, ƙamus na al'ada, da nau'ikan masu fassara na al'ada.

configuration.title: Daidaitawa
configuration.lede: Bayyana tsoho sau ɗaya a cikin .github/resource-translator.yml kuma bari kowane aiki ya gaji su. Abubuwan da aka yi amfani da su koyaushe suna cin nasara lokacin da aka samar da duka biyun.

inputs.title: Abubuwan shigarwa da fitarwa
inputs.lede: Hakanan ana karɓar kowane shigarwa a cikin fayil ɗin repo na zaɓi. Lokacin da aka saita duka biyun, shigar da aikin ya ci nasara.

formats.title: Tsarin fayil
formats.heroTitle: Tsarin fayil ɗin da aka goyi bayan
formats.lede: Tsarin albarkatun zagaye guda shida. Aikin yana karanta kowane fayil ɗin tushe, yana fassara dabi'u, kuma yana rubuta ɗan'uwa a kowane yanki da aka yi niyya.

recipes.title: Girke-girke
recipes.lede: Alamu na yau da kullun don fassarar jigilar kaya: monorepos, ƙamus ɗin, nau'ikan al'ada, bushewar gudu, da sarrafa sauti.

faq.title: Tambayoyin da aka fi yawan yi
faq.lede: Amsoshi masu sauri ga tambayoyin da suka fi tasowa yayin ɗaukar matakin.

translations.title: Fassarar
translations.currentlyRendered: An yi amfani da shi a halin yanzu
translations.pendingPrefix: A jiran fassarar Docs na gaba.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Bincika ta hanyar harshe, lambar ko sunan asali.
translations.translationPending: Translation pending — open a translate-docs run.
translations.noLocales: Babu wurare da suka dace da wannan tace.

contributing.title: Bayar da gudummawa
contributing.lede: Rahotannin kwaro, buƙatun fasali, da buƙatun jawo duk ana maraba da su. Aikin yana da ƙaramin isa ya zama abokantaka ga masu ba da gudummawa na farko.

changelog.title: Canje-canje
changelog.lede: Babban taƙaitaccen taƙaitaccen bayani game da fitarwa. Canonical, canji mai iko yana rayuwa a cikin CHANGELOG.md a cikin ma'ajiyar.
